mapper.select: select parent_id from am_archive_category where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
select count(*) from am_archive_category where parent_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.update: update am_archive_category set item_table_name = case when #{archiveLevel} = 'ITEM' and #{fieldScope} = 'METADATA' then #{tableName} else item_table_name end, volume_table_name = case when #{archiveLevel} = 'VOLUME' and #{fieldScope} = 'METADATA' then #{tableName} else volume_table_name end, item_physical_table_name = case when #{archiveLevel} = 'ITEM' and #{fieldScope} = 'PHYSICAL' then #{tableName} else item_physical_table_name end, volume_physical_table_name = case when #{archiveLevel} = 'VOLUME' and #{fieldScope} = 'PHYSICAL' then #{tableName} else volume_physical_table_name end, table_status = #{tableStatus}, built_at = localtimestamp, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.select: select id, volume_id, fonds_code, fonds_name, category_code, category_name, archive_no, electronic_status, security_level_id, retention_period_id, department_id, archive_year, display_order, created_at, locked_flag, lock_reason, locked_by, locked_at from am_archive_item where deleted_flag = false order by sort_order, id desc

select related_category_id, related_category_code, related_category_name, case when has_reverse then 'BOTH' else 'OUTGOING' end as direction from ( select distinct tc.id as related_category_id, tc.category_code as related_category_code, tc.category_name as related_category_name, exists ( select 1 from am_archive_item_relation rrel join am_archive_item rsi on rsi.id = rrel.source_item_id and rsi.deleted_flag = false join am_archive_item rti on rti.id = rrel.target_item_id and rti.deleted_flag = false where rsi.category_code = tc.category_code and rti.category_code = sc.category_code ) as has_reverse from am_archive_item_relation rel join am_archive_item si on si.id = rel.source_item_id and si.deleted_flag = false join am_archive_category sc on sc.category_code = si.category_code and sc.deleted_flag = false join am_archive_item ti on ti.id = rel.target_item_id and ti.deleted_flag = false join am_archive_category tc on tc.category_code = ti.category_code and tc.deleted_flag = false and tc.enabled = true where sc.id = #{categoryId} ) related_categories order by related_category_name, related_category_id
select i.id, i.fonds_code ${selectColumns} from am_archive_item i join ${tableName} d on d.id = i.id where i.deleted_flag = false and d.deleted_flag = false order by i.id

insert into am_archive_item (volume_id, fonds_code, fonds_name, category_code, category_name, archive_no, electronic_status, security_level_id, retention_period_id, department_id, archive_year, created_by, updated_by) values (#{volumeId}, #{fondsCode}, #{fondsName}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{archiveNo}, #{electronicStatus}, #{securityLevelId}, #{retentionPeriodId}, #{departmentId}, #{archiveYear}, #{userId}, #{userId}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_item set archive_no = #{archiveNo}, volume_id = #{volumeId}, fonds_code = #{fondsCode}, fonds_name = #{fondsName}, electronic_status = #{electronicStatus}, security_level_id = #{securityLevelId}, retention_period_id = #{retentionPeriodId}, department_id = #{departmentId}, archive_year = #{archiveYear}, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false and locked_flag = false
update ${tableName} set deleted_flag = true, deleted_at = localtimestamp, deleted_by = #{userId}, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.select: select id, volume_id, fonds_code, fonds_name, category_code, category_name, archive_no, electronic_status, security_level_id, retention_period_id, department_id, archive_year, locked_flag, lock_reason, locked_by, locked_at from am_archive_item where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

select id, fonds_code, fonds_name, category_code, category_name, archive_no, electronic_status, archive_year, locked_flag, lock_reason, locked_by, locked_at from am_archive_volume where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

insert into am_archive_volume (fonds_code, fonds_name, category_code, category_name, archive_no, electronic_status, archive_year, created_by, updated_by) values (#{fondsCode}, #{fondsName}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{archiveNo}, #{electronicStatus}, #{archiveYear}, #{userId}, #{userId}) returning id

select ef.id, ef.archive_item_id, ef.storage_object_id, ef.usage_type, ef.display_order, so.original_filename, so.file_size, so.content_type, so.checksum_sha256, ef.created_at from am_archive_item_electronic_file ef join am_storage_object so on so.id = ef.storage_object_id where so.deleted_at is null and ef.archive_item_id = #{archiveItemId} order by ef.display_order, ef.id

insert into am_archive_item_electronic_file (archive_item_id, storage_object_id, usage_type, display_order, created_by) values (#{archiveItemId}, #{storageObjectId}, #{usageType}, #{displayOrder}, #{userId}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_item set deleted_flag = true, deleted_at = localtimestamp, deleted_by = #{userId}, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false and locked_flag = false

update am_archive_item set locked_flag = true, lock_reason = #{lockReason}, locked_by = #{lockedBy}, locked_at = localtimestamp, updated_by = #{lockedBy}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

update am_archive_item set locked_flag = false, lock_reason = null, locked_by = null, locked_at = null, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.insert: insert into am_archive_item_search (archive_item_id, search_text, index_version) values (#{archiveItemId}, #{searchText}, #{indexVersion}) on conflict (archive_item_id) do update set search_text = excluded.search_text, index_version = excluded.index_version, updated_at = localtimestamp
mapper.select: select id, archive_item_id, event_type from am_archive_item_search_outbox where status = 'PENDING' and (next_retry_at is null or next_retry_at <= localtimestamp) order by id limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update am_archive_item_search_outbox set status = 'PROCESSED', processed_at = localtimestamp, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id}

update am_archive_item_search_outbox set status = 'PENDING', attempts = attempts + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, next_retry_at = localtimestamp + interval '1 minute', updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, category_id, archive_level, constraint_code, constraint_name, index_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at from am_archive_unique_constraint where category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false order by archive_level, id
select id, category_id, archive_level, constraint_code, constraint_name, index_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at from am_archive_unique_constraint where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

insert into am_archive_unique_constraint (category_id, archive_level, constraint_code, constraint_name, index_name, enabled, created_by, updated_by) values (#{categoryId}, #{archiveLevel}, #{constraintCode}, #{constraintName}, #{indexName}, #{enabled}, #{userId}, #{userId}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_unique_constraint set archive_level = #{archiveLevel}, constraint_code = #{constraintCode}, constraint_name = #{constraintName}, index_name = #{indexName}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false

update am_archive_unique_constraint set deleted_flag = true, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.insert: insert into am_archive_unique_constraint_field (constraint_id, field_id, field_order) values (#{constraintId}, #{fieldId}, #{fieldOrder})
mapper.select: select rf.id, rf.constraint_id, rf.field_id, rf.field_order, f.archive_level, f.field_code, f.field_name, f.column_name from am_archive_unique_constraint_field rf join am_archive_field f on f.id = rf.field_id and f.deleted_flag = false where rf.constraint_id = #{constraintId} order by rf.field_order, rf.id
mapper.update:
update am_archive_field set exact_searchable = true, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false and id in
#{fieldId}

update am_archive_item set volume_id = #{volumeId}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{archiveItemId} and deleted_flag = false and locked_flag = false
mapper.select: select rel.id, rel.source_item_id, rel.target_item_id, rel.created_at, ti.fonds_code as target_fonds_code, ti.fonds_name as target_fonds_name, ti.category_code as target_category_code, ti.category_name as target_category_name, ti.archive_no as target_archive_no from am_archive_item_relation rel join am_archive_item ti on ti.id = rel.target_item_id and ti.deleted_flag = false where rel.source_item_id = #{sourceItemId} order by rel.id
insert into am_archive_item_relation (source_item_id, target_item_id) values (#{sourceItemId}, #{targetItemId}) returning id

select id, category_id, table_code, table_name, physical_table_name, sort_order, enabled from am_archive_item_line_table where category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false order by sort_order, id
select id, category_id, table_code, table_name, physical_table_name, sort_order, enabled from am_archive_item_line_table where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

insert into am_archive_item_line_table (category_id, table_code, table_name, physical_table_name, sort_order, created_by, updated_by) values (#{categoryId}, #{tableCode}, #{tableName}, #{physicalTableName}, #{sortOrder}, #{userId}, #{userId}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_item_line_table set physical_table_name = #{physicalTableName}, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.select: select id, line_table_id, field_code, field_name, field_type, column_name, exact_searchable, sort_order, enabled from am_archive_item_line_field where line_table_id = #{lineTableId} and deleted_flag = false order by sort_order, id

insert into am_archive_item_line_field (line_table_id, field_code, field_name, field_type, column_name, exact_searchable, sort_order, created_by, updated_by) values (#{lineTableId}, #{fieldCode}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldType}, #{columnName}, #{exactSearchable}, #{sortOrder}, #{userId}, #{userId}) returning id
